name: Yungjin Pharm. Co., Ltd.
summary: Yungjin Pharm. Co., Ltd. operates as a pharmaceutical company in South Korea. It provides cephalosporin, general, and calcium APIs; antibiotic, central nervous system, cardiovascular, endocrine, respiratory, analgesic and anti-inflammatory, anti-histamine, anti-fungal, nutrition, and urinary formulations, as well as vitamins and supplements, and cosmetics; and tonic drinks. The company was founded in 1952 and is based in Seoul, South Korea. Yungjin Pharm. Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of KT&G Corporation.
